30778.zh_abstract: 标准的Berry、Levinsohn和Pakes（1995）（BLP）方法在估计需求和供给参数时，假设消费者和生产者观察到但研究者未观测到的产品特征在条件均值上独立于观测特征。我们将BLP扩展为允许所有产品特征内生，因此未观测特征可以与观测特征相关。我们基于以下假设推导矩条件：企业根据其对市场状况的信念选择产品特征以最大化预期利润，并且一旦所有产品上市后揭示的特征数量中的“错误”在条件均值上独立于企业的信息集。使用原始BLP数据集，我们发现观测和未观测产品特征高度正相关，导致需求弹性向上偏误，因为平均估计价格弹性的绝对值翻倍，平均加成率下降50%。

30777.title: Refining Public Policies with Machine Learning: The Case of Tax Auditing
30777.zh_title: 用机器学习优化公共政策：以税务审计为例
30777.authors: Marco Battaglini, Luigi Guiso, Chiara Lacava, Douglas L. Miller, Eleonora Patacchini
30777.abstract: We study the extent to which ML techniques can be used to improve tax auditing efficiency using administrative data, without the need of randomized audits. Using Italy's population data on sole proprietorship tax returns, audits and their outcome, we develop a new approach to address the so called selective labels problem - the fact that a ML algorithm must necessarily be trained on endogenously selected data. We document the existence of substantial margins for raising revenue from audits by improving the selection of taxpayers to audit with ML. Replacing the 10% least productive audits with an equal number of taxpayers selected by our trained algorithm raises detected tax evasion by as much as 38%, and evasion that is actually payed back by 29%.
30777.zh_abstract: 我们研究了机器学习技术能在多大程度上利用行政数据提高税务审计效率，而无需随机审计。利用意大利个体经营者纳税申报、审计及其结果的全人口数据，我们开发了一种新方法来解决所谓的“选择性标签”问题——即机器学习算法必须在内生选择的数据上进行训练的事实。我们记录了通过改进机器学习选择的纳税人进行审计来提高审计收入的巨大空间。用我们训练的算法选择的同等数量纳税人替换10%效率最低的审计，可使检测到的逃税增加高达38%，实际追回的逃税增加29%。

30776.title: Lasting Scars: The Impact of Depression in Early Adulthood on Subsequent Labor Market Outcomes
30776.zh_title: 持久的伤痕：成年早期抑郁对后续劳动力市场结果的影响
30776.authors: Buyi Wang, Richard G. Frank, Sherry A. Glied
30776.abstract: A growing body of evidence indicates that poor health early in life can leave lasting scars on adult health and economic outcomes. While much of this literature focuses on childhood experiences, mechanisms generating these lasting effects – recurrence of illness and interruption of human capital accumulation – are not limited to childhood. In this study, we examine how an episode of depression experienced in early adulthood affects subsequent labor market outcomes. We find that, at age 50, people who had met diagnostic criteria for depression when surveyed at ages 27-35 earn 10% lower hourly wages (conditional on occupation) and work 120-180 fewer hours annually, together generating 24% lower annual wage incomes. A portion of this income penalty (21-39%) occurs because depression is often a chronic condition, recurring later in life. But a substantial share (25-55%) occurs because depression in early adulthood disrupts human capital accumulation, by reducing work experience and by influencing selection into occupations with skill distributions that offer lower potential for wage growth. These lingering effects of early depression reinforce the importance of early and multifaceted intervention to address depression and its follow-on effects in the workplace.
30776.zh_abstract: 越来越多的证据表明，生命早期的健康不佳可能对成年后的健康和经济结果留下持久伤痕。虽然这一文献主要关注童年经历，但产生这些持久影响的机制——疾病复发和人力资本积累中断——并不仅限于童年。在本研究中，我们考察了成年早期经历的抑郁发作如何影响后续劳动力市场结果。我们发现，在50岁时，那些在27-35岁调查时符合抑郁症诊断标准的人，小时工资（按职业条件）低10%，年工作时间少120-180小时，共同导致年工资收入低24%。这部分收入惩罚（21-39%）是因为抑郁症通常是一种慢性疾病，会在以后的生活中复发。但很大一部分（25-55%）是因为成年早期的抑郁症通过减少工作经验以及影响进入技能分布提供较低工资增长潜力的职业选择，从而破坏了人力资本积累。早期抑郁的这些持久影响强化了早期和多方面干预以应对抑郁症及其在工作场所后续效应的重要性。

30775.title: Search Frictions and Product Design in the Municipal Bond Market
30775.zh_title: 市政债券市场中的搜索摩擦与产品设计
30775.abstract: This paper shows that product design shapes search frictions and that intermediaries leverage this channel to increase their rents in the context of the U.S. municipal bond market. The majority of bonds are designed via negotiations between a local government and its underwriter. They are then traded in a decentralized market, where the underwriter often also acts as an intermediary. Exploiting variations in state regulations that limit government officials’ conflicts of interest, we provide evidence that bond design from the government’s perspective involves a trade-off between flexibility and liquidity, but the underwriter benefits from designing and trading complex bonds. Motivated by these findings, we build and estimate a model of bond origination and trades to quantify market inefficiency driven by underwriters’ role in intermediating trades and discuss policy implications.
30775.zh_abstract: 本文表明，产品设计塑造了搜索摩擦，而中介机构利用这一渠道在美国市政债券市场中增加其租金。大多数债券是通过地方政府与其承销商之间的谈判设计的。这些债券随后在分散化市场中进行交易，承销商通常也充当中介角色。利用限制政府官员利益冲突的州法规差异，我们提供了证据表明，从政府角度看，债券设计涉及灵活性与流动性之间的权衡，但承销商从设计和交易复杂债券中获益。受这些发现的启发，我们构建并估计了一个债券发行和交易模型，以量化由承销商在交易中介中的角色所驱动的市场低效率，并讨论政策含义。
30775.meta: Programs：IO, PE, POL；JEL：L0, L12, L15, P0

30774.title: Heterogeneous Downward Nominal Wage Rigidity: Foundations of a Nonlinear Phillips Curve
30774.zh_title: 异质性向下名义工资刚性：非线性菲利普斯曲线的基础
30774.abstract: We propose a model with heterogeneous downward nominal wage rigidity for individual labor varieties. The model delivers a nonlinear wage Phillips curve linking current wage inflation with current unemployment that is relatively steep at high levels of inflation and flat at low levels of inflation. The predicted nonlinear Phillips curve matches well the pattern of wage inflation and unemployment observed in the United States over the past 40 years. In particular, it accounts for the resilience of the labor market in the tightening cycle following the Covid-19 inflation spike and for the missing inflation in the recovery from the 2008 great contraction. Finally, although the model features occasionally binding constraints for individual labor types, there are no such constraints in the aggregate, making the model amenable to perturbation analysis.
30774.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个针对个体劳动品种类具有异质性向下名义工资刚性的模型。该模型产生了一条非线性的工资菲利普斯曲线，将当前工资通胀与当前失业率联系起来，该曲线在高通胀水平下相对陡峭，在低通胀水平下平坦。预测的非线性菲利普斯曲线很好地匹配了美国过去40年观察到的工资通胀和失业率模式。特别是，它解释了新冠疫情通胀飙升后紧缩周期中劳动力市场的韧性，以及2008年大衰退复苏中缺失的通胀。最后，尽管该模型对个体劳动类型具有偶尔有约束力的约束，但在总体上不存在此类约束，这使得该模型适用于扰动分析。

30773.title: An Approach to Testing Reference Points
30773.zh_title: 一种检验参考点的方法
30773.abstract: We present a general approach to experimentally testing candidate reference points. This approach builds from Prospect Theory’s prediction that an increase in payoffs is perfectly offset by an equivalent increase in the reference point. Violation of this prediction can be tested with modifications to existing econometric techniques in experiments of a particular design. The resulting approach to testing theories of the reference point is minimally parametric, robust to broad classes of heterogeneity, yet still implementable in comparatively small sample sizes. We demonstrate the application of this approach in an experiment that tests the role of salience in setting reference points.
30773.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在实验中检验候选参考点的通用方法。该方法基于前景理论的预测，即收益的增加被参考点的等量增加完全抵消。可以通过对特定设计实验中的现有计量经济学技术进行修改来检验这一预测的违背情况。由此产生的检验参考点理论的方法参数化程度最低，对广泛的异质性具有稳健性，但仍可在相对较小的样本量中实施。我们通过一个实验展示了该方法的应用，该实验检验了显著性在设定参考点中的作用。

30772.title: Who Stands on the Shoulders of Chinese (Scientific) Giants? Evidence from Chemistry
30772.zh_title: 谁站在中国（科学）巨人的肩膀上？来自化学领域的证据
30772.authors: Shumin Qiu, Claudia Steinwender, Pierre Azoulay
30772.abstract: China’s rise in science has the potential to push forward the knowledge frontier, but mere production of knowledge does not guarantee that others are able to build on it. We ask whether chemistry research originating from China offers broad shoulders for follow-on scientists to stand on. We show that even after carefully controlling for the quality of Chinese research, Chinese scientists’ articles receive on average 28% fewer citations from US researchers, relative to scientists from other countries. Only Chinese researchers with unusually deep networks in the US can overcome, at least in part, the citation discount.
30772.zh_abstract: 中国在科学领域的崛起有可能推动知识前沿，但仅仅产生知识并不能保证其他人能够在此基础上发展。我们探究来自中国的化学研究是否为后续科学家提供了可以依靠的广阔肩膀。我们表明，即使在仔细控制了中国研究质量之后，相对于来自其他国家的科学家，中国科学家的文章平均被美国研究人员引用的次数少28%。只有在美国拥有异常深厚人脉网络的中国研究人员才能至少部分克服这种引用折扣。

30771.title: Corporate Social Responsibility
30771.abstract: Is shareholder interest in corporate social responsibility driven by pecuniary motives (abnormal rates of return) or non-pecuniary ones (willingness to sacrifice returns to address various firm externalities)? To answer this question, we categorize the literature into seven tests: (1) costs of capital, (2) performance of portfolios, (3) ownership by types of institutions, (4) surveys and experiments, (5) managerial motives, (6) shareholder proposals, and (7) firm inclusion in responsibility indices. These tests and the most recent proposals data predominantly indicate that shareholders are driven by non-pecuniary motives. To stimulate further research on welfare implications for global warming, we assess whether estimates of the returns shareholders are willing to sacrifice (or, ‘greeniums’), along with the increasing amounts of assets pledged to firms that become sustainable, are consistent with the growth of aggregate investments in the decarbonization sector.
30771.zh_abstract: 股东对企业社会责任的兴趣是由金钱动机（异常回报率）还是非金钱动机（愿意牺牲回报以解决各种企业外部性问题）驱动的？为了回答这个问题，我们将文献分为七类检验：（1）资本成本，（2）投资组合表现，（3）机构类型的所有权，（4）调查与实验，（5）管理层动机，（6）股东提案，以及（7）公司纳入责任指数。这些检验以及最新的提案数据主要表明，股东受非金钱动机驱动。为了激发关于全球变暖福利影响的进一步研究，我们评估了股东愿意牺牲的回报估计值（或“绿色溢价”）以及承诺给变得可持续的企业的资产增加量，是否与脱碳部门总投资的增长相一致。
30771.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G1, G10, G12, G14, G17, G19, G2, G20, G21, G23, G3, G31, G35, G39, G4

30770.title: ACA Medicaid Expansions and Maternal Morbidity
30770.zh_title: ACA医疗补助扩展与孕产妇发病率
30770.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Hanna Glenn, Sara Markowitz, Jennifer Karas Montez
30770.abstract: In this paper, we test whether the Affordable Care Act Medicaid expansions are associated with in-hospital maternal morbidity. The ACA expansions may have affected maternal morbidity by increasing pre-conception access to health care, and by improving the quality of delivery care through enhancing hospitals’ financial positions. We use difference-in-difference models in conjunction with event studies. Data come from individual-level birth certificates and state-level hospital discharge data. The results show little evidence that the expansions are associated with overall maternal morbidity or indicators of specific adverse events including eclampsia, ruptured uterus, and unplanned hysterectomy. The results are consistent with prior research showing that the ACA Medicaid expansions are not statistically associated with pre-pregnancy health or maternal health during pregnancy. Our results add to this story and find little evidence of improvements in maternal health upon delivery.
30770.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们检验了《平价医疗法案》医疗补助扩展是否与院内孕产妇发病率相关。ACA扩展可能通过增加孕前医疗保健的可及性，以及通过改善医院财务状况来提高分娩护理质量，从而影响孕产妇发病率。我们使用双重差分模型并结合事件研究。数据来自个体层面的出生证明和州层面的医院出院数据。结果显示，几乎没有证据表明扩展与总体孕产妇发病率或特定不良事件指标（包括子痫、子宫破裂和计划外子宫切除术）相关。这些结果与先前的研究一致，表明ACA医疗补助扩展在统计上与孕前健康或孕期孕产妇健康无关。我们的结果补充了这一结论，并发现几乎没有证据表明分娩时孕产妇健康有所改善。

30769.title: U.S. School Finance: Resources and Outcomes
30769.zh_title: 美国学校财政：资源与成果
30769.authors: Danielle V. Handel, Eric A. Hanushek
30769.abstract: The impact of school resources on student outcomes was first raised in the 1960s and has been controversial since then. This issue enters into the decision making on school finance in both legislatures and the courts. The historical research found little consistent or systematic relationship of spending and achievement, but this research frequently suffers from significant concerns about the underlying estimation strategies. More recent work has re-opened the fundamental resource-achievement relationship with more compelling analyses that offer stronger identification of resource impacts. A thorough review of existing studies, however, leads to conclusions similar to those in the historical work: how resources are used is key to the outcomes. At the same time, the research has not been successful at identifying mechanisms underlying successful use of resources or for ascertaining when added school investments are likely to be well-used. Direct investigations of alternative input policies (capital spending, reducing class size, and salary incentives for teachers) do not provide clear support for such specific policy initiatives in the United States.
30769.zh_abstract: 学校资源对学生成果的影响最早在20世纪60年代被提出，此后一直存在争议。这一问题在立法机构和法院的学校财政决策中都有涉及。历史研究发现支出与成就之间几乎没有一致或系统的关系，但这类研究常常因基本估计策略存在重大缺陷而受到质疑。近期研究以更具说服力的分析重新审视了资源与成就的基本关系，这些分析提供了更强的资源影响识别。然而，对现有研究的全面回顾得出了与历史工作相似的结论：资源如何使用是成果的关键。同时，研究未能成功识别成功使用资源的机制，或确定何时新增学校投资可能得到良好利用。对美国具体投入政策（资本支出、缩小班级规模和教师薪酬激励）的直接调查并未为这些政策举措提供明确支持。
30769.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H41, H72, I20, J08

30768.title: Detecting Fraud in Development Aid
30768.zh_title: 发展援助中的欺诈检测
30768.abstract: When organizations have limited accountability, antifraud measures, including auditing, often face barriers due to institutional resistance and practical difficulties on the ground. This is especially true in development aid, where aid organizations face incentives to suppress information about misappropriated funds and may operate with limited transparency. We develop new statistical tests to uncover strategic data manipulation consistent with fraud. These tests help identify falsified expense reports and facilitate monitoring in difficult-to-audit circumstances, relying only on mandated reporting of data. While the digits of naturally occurring data follow the Benford’s Law distribution, humanly-produced data instead reflect behavioral biases and incentives to misreport. Our new tests improve upon existing Benford’s Law tests by being sensitive to the value of digits reported, which distinguishes between intent to defraud and error, and by improving statistical power to allow for finer partitioning of the data.
30768.zh_abstract: 当组织问责有限时，包括审计在内的反欺诈措施常常因制度阻力和实地实际困难而面临障碍。在发展援助中尤其如此，援助组织有动机压制关于挪用资金的信息，并且可能在透明度有限的情况下运作。我们开发了新的统计检验来揭示与欺诈一致的战略性数据操纵。这些检验有助于识别伪造的费用报告，并在难以审计的情况下促进监控，仅依赖于强制报告的数据。虽然自然发生的数据的数字遵循本福特定律分布，但人为产生的数据反而反映了行为偏差和误报动机。我们的新检验改进了现有的本福特定律检验，通过关注报告数字的值来区分欺诈意图和错误，并通过提高统计功效以允许对数据进行更精细的划分。
30768.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：C49, D73, H83, M42, O22

30767.title: Racial Concordance and the Quality of Medical Care: Evidence from the Military
30767.zh_title: 种族匹配与医疗质量：来自军方的证据
30767.abstract: One explanation for insufficient use of primary care in the U.S. is a lack of trust between patients and providers – particularly along racial lines. We assess the role of racial concordance between patients and medical providers in driving use of preventive care and the implications for patient outcomes. We use unique data from the Military Health System, where we observe providers as patients so that we can identify their race, and where moves across bases change exposure to provider race. We consider patients with four chronic, deadly, but ultimately manageable illnesses, where the relationship with the provider may have the most direct and important impact on health. We find striking evidence that racial concordance leads to improved maintenance of preventive care – and ultimately lower patient mortality. Pooling across these diseases, we estimate that a one-standard deviation increase in the share of providers who are Black leads to a 15% relative decline in Black mortality among those with these manageable illnesses. Our results further suggest that between 55 and 69% of this mortality impact arises through improved medication use and adherence, with other aspects of the provider-patient relationship accounting for the residual.
30767.zh_abstract: 美国初级保健利用不足的一个解释是患者与医疗服务提供者之间缺乏信任——尤其是在种族方面。我们评估了患者与医疗服务提供者之间的种族匹配在推动预防性保健使用中的作用及其对患者结局的影响。我们使用了来自军事卫生系统的独特数据，在该系统中，我们将医疗服务提供者视为患者，从而能够识别他们的种族，并且跨基地的调动会改变患者接触到的提供者种族。我们考虑了四种慢性、致命但最终可控的疾病患者，在这些疾病中，与提供者的关系可能对健康产生最直接和最重要的影响。我们发现了显著的证据表明，种族匹配能改善预防性保健的维持——并最终降低患者死亡率。综合这些疾病，我们估计，黑人提供者比例每增加一个标准差，患有这些可控疾病的黑人死亡率就会相对下降15%。我们的结果进一步表明，这种死亡率影响中有55%至69%源于药物使用和依从性的改善，而医患关系的其他方面则解释了剩余部分。
30767.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I14, J14

30766.title: Evictions and Psychiatric Treatment
30766.abstract: Stable housing is critical for health, employment, education, and other social outcomes. Evictions reflect a form of housing instability that is experienced by millions of Americans each year. Inadequately treated psychiatric disorders have the potential to influence evictions in several ways. For example, these disorders may impede labor market performance and thus the ability to pay rent, or increase the likelihood of risky and/or nuisance behaviors that can lead to a lease violation. We estimate the effect of local access to psychiatric treatment on eviction rates. We combine data on the number of psychiatric treatment centers that offer outpatient and residential care within a county with eviction rates in a two-way fixed-effects framework. Our findings imply that ten additional psychiatric treatment centers in a county lead to a reduction of 2.1% in the eviction rate.
30766.zh_abstract: 稳定的住房对于健康、就业、教育和其他社会结果至关重要。驱逐反映了一种住房不稳定形式，每年有数百万美国人经历这种不稳定。未经充分治疗的精神疾病可能以多种方式影响驱逐。例如，这些疾病可能阻碍劳动力市场表现，从而影响支付租金的能力，或者增加可能导致租约违规的风险和/或滋扰行为的可能性。我们估算了当地获得精神治疗对驱逐率的影响。我们将一个县内提供门诊和住院护理的精神治疗中心数量数据与驱逐率数据结合，采用双向固定效应框架进行分析。我们的研究结果表明，一个县内每增加十个精神治疗中心，驱逐率就会降低2.1%。

30765.title: Anticipated Gender Discrimination and Grade Disclosure
30765.zh_title: 预期性别歧视与成绩披露
30765.authors: Louis-Pierre Lepage, Xiaomeng Li, Basit Zafar
30765.abstract: We study a unique grading policy at a large US public university allowing students to mask their letter grades into a “Pass”, after having observed their original grade. Using administrative transcript records, we find that female students are substantially less likely to mask their grades than male students, even after accounting for differences in grades, GPA, and course/major taking. We present a framework showing how anticipated discrimination in the labor market can distort incentives to mask across gender. Consistent with the framework, a survey reveals that students anticipate that female students, particularly in STEM, Business, and Economics, will face labor market discrimination which makes them less likely to mask. Our survey allows us to distinguish between anticipated discrimination and other explanations which could contribute to the masking gap, such as preferences for risk or transparency. We find that anticipated discrimination can explain a sizable fraction of the gender gap in masking.
30765.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一所美国大型公立大学的一项独特评分政策，该政策允许学生在看到原始成绩后，将字母成绩掩盖为“通过”。使用行政成绩单记录，我们发现，即使在考虑了成绩、GPA以及课程/专业选择的差异后，女学生掩盖成绩的可能性也远低于男学生。我们提出了一个框架，展示了劳动力市场中预期的歧视如何扭曲不同性别掩盖成绩的激励。与该框架一致，一项调查显示，学生预期女学生——尤其是在STEM、商业和经济学领域——将面临劳动力市场歧视，这使得她们不太可能掩盖成绩。我们的调查使我们能够区分预期歧视与其他可能导致掩盖差距的解释，例如对风险或透明度的偏好。我们发现，预期歧视可以解释掩盖行为中性别差距的相当大一部分。

30764.title: The Scale and Nature of Neighborhood Effects on Children: Evidence from a Danish Social Housing Experiment
30764.zh_title: 邻里效应对儿童的规模与性质：来自丹麦社会住房实验的证据
30764.authors: Stephen B. Billings, Mark Hoekstra, Gabriel Pons Rotger
30764.abstract: Recent research documents a causal impact of place on the long-run outcomes of children. However, little is known about which neighborhood characteristics are most important, and at what scale neighborhood effects operate. By using the random assignment of public housing along with administrative data from Denmark, we get inside the “black box” of neighborhood effects by defining neighborhoods using various characteristics and scales. Results indicate effects on mental health and especially education are large but local, while effects on drug possession operate on a much broader scale. Additionally, unemployment and education are better predictors of outcomes than neighborhood income.
30764.zh_abstract: 最近的研究记录了居住地对儿童长期结果的因果影响。然而，关于哪些邻里特征最为重要，以及邻里效应在何种规模上运作，我们知之甚少。通过利用丹麦公共住房的随机分配以及行政数据，我们通过使用各种特征和规模来定义邻里，从而深入探究邻里效应的“黑箱”。结果表明，对心理健康尤其是教育的影响很大但具有局部性，而对毒品持有的影响则在更广泛的规模上运作。此外，失业率和教育比邻里收入更能预测结果。

30763.title: Evolving Reputation for Commitment: The Rise, Fall and Stabilization of US Inflation
30763.zh_title: 承诺声誉的演变：美国通胀的上升、下降与稳定
30763.authors: Robert G. King, Yang K. Lu
30763.abstract: A parsimonious model of shifting policy regimes can simultaneously capture expected and actual US inflation during 1969-2005. Our model features a forward-looking New Keynesian Phillips curve and purposeful policymakers that can or cannot commit. Private sector learning about policymaker type leads to a reputation state variable. We use model inflation forecasting rules to extract state variables from SPF inflation forecasts. US inflation is tracked by optimal policy without commitment before 1981 and by optimal policy with commitment afterward. In theory and quantification, the interaction of private sector learning and optimal policy within regimes is central to expected and actual inflation.
30763.zh_abstract: 一个关于政策体制转变的简约模型可以同时捕捉1969年至2005年间美国预期和实际通胀。我们的模型包含一个前瞻性的新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线，以及能够或不能做出承诺的有目的的政策制定者。私营部门对政策制定者类型的学习产生了一个声誉状态变量。我们使用模型通胀预测规则从SPF通胀预测中提取状态变量。1981年之前的美国通胀由无承诺的最优政策追踪，而之后则由有承诺的最优政策追踪。在理论和量化分析中，体制内私营部门学习与最优政策的相互作用对预期和实际通胀至关重要。

30762.title: Designing Randomized Controlled Trials with External Validity in Mind
30762.zh_title: 设计具有外部效度的随机对照试验
30762.abstract: This paper describes a number of strategies that experimenters may use to improve the external validity of their own findings, and of their research field as a whole. The paper emphasizes a dynamic view of research processes, in which learning about treatment and treatment adoption does not cease after a given study is performed. External validity need not be an unattainable goal in such a context. However, because researchers today need not be the same as researchers and policy-makers tomorrow, dynamic research processes are affected by research externalities, i.e. research practices that have high social value but low private returns. The paper identifies several of these research externalities and argues that funding organizations can have a significant impact at a relatively modest cost by subsidizing external-validity add-on modules specifically targeting research externalities.
30762.zh_abstract: 本文描述了实验者可以用来提高自身研究结果以及整个研究领域外部效度的一系列策略。本文强调研究过程的动态视角，其中关于处理和治疗采纳的学习在给定研究完成后并不会停止。在这种背景下，外部效度不必是一个无法实现的目标。然而，由于今天的研究者不必与明天的研究者和政策制定者相同，动态研究过程受到研究外部性的影响，即具有高社会价值但低私人回报的研究实践。本文识别了其中几种研究外部性，并认为资助组织可以通过补贴专门针对研究外部性的外部效度附加模块，以相对适中的成本产生显著影响。

30761.title: Missing Data in Asset Pricing Panels
30761.zh_title: 资产定价面板中的缺失数据
30761.authors: Joachim Freyberger, Björn Höppner, Andreas Neuhierl, Michael Weber
30761.abstract: Missing data for return predictors is a common problem in cross sectional asset pricing. Most papers do not explicitly discuss how they deal with missing data but conventional treatments focus on the subset of firms with no missing data for any predictor or impute the unconditional mean. Both methods have undesirable properties - they are either inefficient or lead to biased estimators and incorrect inference. We propose a simple and computationally attractive alternative using conditional mean imputations and weighted least squares, cast in a generalized method of moments (GMM) framework. This method allows us to use all observations with observed returns, it results in valid inference, and it can be applied in non-linear and high-dimensional settings. In Monte Carlo simulations, we find that it performs almost as well as the efficient but computationally costly GMM estimator in many cases. We apply our procedure to a large panel of return predictors and find that it leads to improved out-of-sample predictability.
30761.zh_abstract: 回报预测变量的数据缺失是横截面资产定价中的一个常见问题。大多数论文没有明确讨论如何处理缺失数据，但传统处理方法侧重于对任何预测变量均无缺失数据的公司子集，或插补无条件均值。这两种方法都有不良特性——它们要么效率低下，要么导致有偏估计和不正确的推断。我们提出了一种简单且计算上有吸引力的替代方法，使用条件均值插补和加权最小二乘法，并将其置于广义矩方法（GMM）框架中。该方法允许我们使用所有具有观测回报的观测值，产生有效的推断，并且可以应用于非线性和高维设置。在蒙特卡洛模拟中，我们发现它在许多情况下表现几乎与高效但计算成本高的GMM估计量一样好。我们将我们的程序应用于一个大的回报预测变量面板，发现它导致了改进的样本外可预测性。

30760.title: The Stench of Failure: How Perception Affects House Prices
30760.zh_title: 失败的污名：感知如何影响房价
30760.authors: Kristle Cortés, Mandeep Singh, David H. Solomon, Philip Strahan
30760.abstract: In Australian real estate markets, about a third of properties are sold at auction. We show that properties that fail auctions sell later for a 2.6% discount. This effect increases for properties failing multiple auctions and when no bids are made. Consistent with a causal channel, the effect holds when auction failure is instrumented by the tendency of owners to anchor on nearby better properties (and thus set reserve prices too high). Prices cluster just below salient round numbers, and the discount fades over time, inconsistent with our effects reflecting unobserved property characteristics. We test for several mechanisms and conclude that most of the pricing discounts reflect stigma, which reduces potential buyers’ willingness to pay.
30760.zh_abstract: 在澳大利亚房地产市场中，大约三分之一的房产通过拍卖出售。我们表明，拍卖失败的房产后来以2.6%的折扣出售。这种效应在多次拍卖失败的房产以及无人出价的情况下会增强。与因果渠道一致，当拍卖失败由业主倾向于锚定附近更好的房产（从而将保留价设定过高）作为工具变量时，这种效应仍然存在。价格聚集在显著的整数关口下方，并且折扣随时间消退，这与我们的效应反映未观察到的房产特征不一致。我们测试了几种机制，并得出结论，大部分定价折扣反映了污名，这降低了潜在买家的支付意愿。

30759.title: Wellbeing Rankings
30759.abstract: Combining data on around four million respondents from the Gallup World Poll and the US Daily Tracker Poll we rank 164 countries, the 50 states of the United States and the District of Colombia on eight wellbeing measures. These are four positive affect measures - life satisfaction, enjoyment, smiling and being well-rested – and four negative affect variables – pain, sadness, anger and worry. Pooling the data for 2008-2017 we find country and state rankings differ markedly depending on whether they are ranked using positive or negative affect measures. The United States ranks lower on negative than positive affect, that is, its country wellbeing ranking looks worse using negative affect than it does when using positive affect. Combining rankings on all eight measures into a summary ranking index for 215 geographical locations we find that nine of the top ten and 16 of the top 20 ranked are US states. Only one US state ranks outside the top 100 – West Virginia (101). Iraq ranks lowest - just below South Sudan. Country-level rankings on the summary wellbeing index differ sharply from those reported in the World Happiness Index and are more comparable to those obtained with the Human Development Index.
30759.zh_abstract: 结合来自盖洛普世界民意调查和美国每日追踪调查约400万受访者的数据，我们根据八项福祉指标对164个国家、美国50个州和哥伦比亚特区进行了排名。这些指标包括四项积极情感指标——生活满意度、愉悦感、微笑和休息充分，以及四项消极情感指标——痛苦、悲伤、愤怒和担忧。汇总2008-2017年的数据，我们发现国家和州的排名根据使用的是积极还是消极情感指标而显著不同。美国在消极情感指标上的排名低于积极情感指标，即使用消极情感指标时其国家福祉排名比使用积极情感指标时更差。将全部八项指标的排名合并为215个地理位置的总体排名指数，我们发现前十名中有九个、前二十名中有十六个是美国州。只有一个美国州排名在前100名之外——西弗吉尼亚州（第101名）。伊拉克排名最低，略低于南苏丹。国家层面的总体福祉指数排名与世界幸福指数报告的结果差异显著，而与人类发展指数得出的结果更具可比性。

30758.title: Does Performance Pay Enhance Social Accountability? Evidence from Remote Schools in Indonesia
30758.zh_title: 绩效薪酬能增强社会问责吗？来自印度尼西亚偏远学校的证据
30758.authors: Arya Gaduh, Menno Pradhan, Jan Priebe, Dewi Susanti
30758.abstract: Social accountability offers a viable alternative to top-down supervision of service delivery in remote areas when travel cost renders the latter ineffective. However, this bottom-up approach may not be effective when the community has weak authority relative to the service provider. This paper investigates whether giving communities authority over teacher performance pay improves the effectiveness of social accountability in Indonesia’s remote schools. We tested incentive contracts based on either camera-verified teacher presence or community ratings of teacher performance. Social accountability had the strongest and most persistent impact on student learning when combined with the former. The results indicate that when the principal (community) has weak authority vis-à-vis the agent (regular teachers), increasing that authority using an incomplete but verifiable contract works better than using a more comprehensive but subjective one.
30758.zh_abstract: 当差旅成本使自上而下的服务监督在偏远地区失效时，社会问责提供了一种可行的替代方案。然而，当社区相对于服务提供者的权威较弱时，这种自下而上的方法可能无效。本文研究了赋予社区对教师绩效薪酬的权威是否能提高印度尼西亚偏远学校社会问责的有效性。我们测试了基于摄像头验证教师出勤率或社区对教师绩效评分的激励合同。社会问责与前者结合时，对学生学习产生了最强烈且最持久的影响。结果表明，当委托人（社区）相对于代理人（正式教师）的权威较弱时，使用一份不完整但可验证的合同来增强这种权威，比使用一份更全面但主观的合同效果更好。
30758.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：H52, I21, I25, I28, O15

30757.title: Public Information as a Source of Disagreement Among Shareholders
30757.zh_title: 公共信息作为股东意见分歧的来源
30757.authors: Laurent Bouton, Aniol Llorente-Saguer, Antonin Macé, Adam Meirowitz, Shaoting Pi, Dimitrios Xefteris
30757.abstract: We study how investors’ beliefs about firm value, and hence their willingness to trade, respond to the release of public information. We consider a standard rational expectations model with homogeneous investors (common preferences, priors, and opinions) with the novelty that information, both public and private, pertains to the decisions the firm will make in the future and whether it is value-enhancing (what we refer to as the path-forward), instead of being directly about the value of the firm. Our analysis shows that, counter to the received wisdom, standard models can explain the well-documented pattern of increased in disagreement and trade volume after public announcements. Two economic insights emerge. First, investors holding different information about the path-forward of the firm may nonetheless have the same assessment of the firm’s value. The release of public information may then reinforce or contradict interim beliefs about the path-forward, and hence lead to divergence in investors’ assessments of the firm’s value and then an increase in trade volume. Second, investors who participate in shareholders’ meetings may have an informational advantage relative to investors that observe only public information about the meeting. The former group know both how they voted and their private information before voting, while others only know the total vote tally. The exploitation of that advantage leads to a surge in trade after public disclosure of meeting outcomes.
30757.zh_abstract: 我们研究投资者对公司价值的信念，以及由此产生的交易意愿，如何响应公共信息的发布。我们考虑一个具有同质投资者（共同偏好、先验和观点）的标准理性预期模型，其新颖之处在于，信息（包括公共和私人信息）涉及公司未来将做出的决策以及这些决策是否增值（我们称之为前进路径），而不是直接关于公司价值。我们的分析表明，与传统观点相反，标准模型可以解释公共公告后意见分歧和交易量增加这一有据可查的模式。由此得出两个经济见解。首先，持有关于公司前进路径不同信息的投资者，可能对公司价值有相同的评估。公共信息的发布可能强化或反驳关于前进路径的中期信念，从而导致投资者对公司价值的评估出现分歧，进而增加交易量。其次，参加股东大会的投资者相对于仅观察会议公共信息的投资者可能具有信息优势。前者群体知道他们如何投票以及投票前的私人信息，而其他人只知道总票数。利用这种优势会导致会议结果公开披露后交易激增。

30756.title: Using Machine Learning for Efficient Flexible Regression Adjustment in Economic Experiments
30756.zh_title: 利用机器学习在经济实验中进行高效灵活回归调整
30756.authors: John A. List, Ian Muir, Gregory K. Sun
30756.abstract: This study investigates the optimal use of covariates in reducing variance when analyzing experimental data. We show that finding the variance-minimizing strategy for making use of pre-treatment observables is equivalent to estimating the conditional expectation function of the outcome given all available pre-randomization observables. This is a pure prediction problem, which recent advances in machine learning (ML) are well-suited to tackling. Through a number of empirical examples, we show how ML-based regression adjustments can feasibly be implemented in practical settings. We compare our proposed estimator to other standard variance reduction techniques in the literature. Two important advantages of our ML-based regression adjustment estimator are that (i) they improve asymptotic efficiency relative to other alternatives, and (ii) they can be implemented automatically, with relatively little tuning from the researcher, which limits the scope for data-snooping.
30756.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了在分析实验数据时协变量在减少方差方面的最优使用。我们证明，找到利用预处理可观测变量以实现方差最小化的策略，等价于估计在给定所有可用随机化前可观测变量条件下的结果条件期望函数。这是一个纯粹的预测问题，机器学习的最新进展非常适合解决。通过一系列实证案例，我们展示了基于机器学习的回归调整如何在实践环境中可行地实施。我们将我们提出的估计量与文献中其他标准方差缩减技术进行了比较。我们基于机器学习的回归调整估计量有两个重要优势：（i）相对于其他替代方案，它们提高了渐近效率；（ii）它们可以自动实施，研究者只需进行相对较少的调整，从而限制了数据窥探的范围。
30756.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C93

30755.title: Optimal Gradualism
30755.abstract: This paper studies how gradualism affects the welfare gains from trade, technology, and reforms. When people face adjustment frictions, gradual shocks create less adverse distributional effects in the short run. We show that there are welfare gains from inducing a more gradual transition via temporary taxes on trade and technology, and provide formulas for the optimal path for taxes. Our formulas account for the possibility that reallocation effort responds to policy, and for the existence of income taxes and assistance programs. Using these formulas, we compute the optimal temporary taxes needed to mitigate the distributional consequences of rising import competition from China and the deployment of automation technologies substituting for routine jobs. Our formulas can also be used to compute the optimal timing of economic reforms or trade liberalizations, and we apply them to study Colombia’s trade liberalization in 1990—a prominent example where optimal policy called for a more gradual reform.
30755.zh_abstract: 本文研究渐进主义如何影响贸易、技术和改革的福利收益。当人们面临调整摩擦时，渐进冲击在短期内产生的负面分配效应较小。我们表明，通过对贸易和技术征收临时税来诱导更渐进的转型可以带来福利收益，并提供了最优税收路径的公式。我们的公式考虑了重新配置努力对政策做出反应的可能性，以及所得税和援助计划的存在。利用这些公式，我们计算了缓解来自中国进口竞争加剧以及替代常规工作的自动化技术部署所带来的分配后果所需的最优临时税。我们的公式也可用于计算经济改革或贸易自由化的最优时机，我们将其应用于研究哥伦比亚1990年的贸易自由化——这是一个最优政策要求更渐进改革的突出例子。
30755.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：E24, F68, H23, J2

30754.title: Dissecting the Sinews of Power: International Trade and the Rise of Britain’s Fiscal-Military State, 1689-1823
30754.zh_title: 剖析权力支柱：国际贸易与大英帝国财政-军事国家的崛起，1689-1823
30754.authors: Ernesto Dal Bó, Karolina Hutková, Lukas Leucht, Noam Yuchtman
30754.abstract: We evaluate the role of taxes on trade in the development of imperial Britain’s fiscal-military state. Influential work, e.g., Brewer’s (1989) "Sinews of Power," attributed increased fiscal capacity to the taxation of domestic, rather than traded, goods: excise revenues, coarsely associated with domestic goods, grew faster than customs revenues. We construct new historical revenue series disaggregating excise revenues from traded and domestic goods. We find substantial growth in taxes on traded goods, accounting for over half of indirect taxation around 1800. This challenges the conventional wisdom attributing the development of the British state to domestic factors: international factors mattered, too.
30754.zh_abstract: 我们评估了贸易税在帝国英国财政-军事国家发展中的作用。有影响力的著作，例如Brewer（1989）的《权力支柱》，将财政能力的增强归因于对国内商品而非贸易商品的征税：与国内商品粗略相关的消费税收入增长快于关税收入。我们构建了新的历史收入序列，将来自贸易商品和国内商品的消费税收入进行分解。我们发现，对贸易商品的税收大幅增长，在1800年左右占间接税的一半以上。这挑战了将英国国家发展归因于国内因素的传统观点：国际因素也很重要。
30754.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE, POL；JEL：H2, N43, P1

30753.title: Non-Fundamental Flows and Foreign Exchange Rates
30753.zh_title: 非基本面资金流与外汇汇率
30753.authors: Felipe E. Aldunate, Zhi Da, Borja Larrain, Clemens Sialm
30753.abstract: Frequent, yet uninformed, fund flows in Chilean pension plans generate substantial trading in currency markets due to the high allocation to international securities. These non-fundamental flows have a significant impact on the Chilean peso, which is estimated to have a relatively low price elasticity of 0.81. Hedging by the banking sector propagates the price pressure to currency forward markets and results in violations of the covered interest rate parity. Using trading data and bank balance sheet data, we confirm that regulatory requirements and banks’ risk bearing constraints create limits of arbitrage.
30753.zh_abstract: 智利养老金计划中频繁但缺乏信息依据的资金流动，由于对国际证券的高配置，在货币市场上产生了大量交易。这些非基本面资金流对智利比索有显著影响，估计其价格弹性相对较低，为0.81。银行部门的对冲行为将价格压力传导至货币远期市场，并导致抛补利率平价被违反。利用交易数据和银行资产负债表数据，我们确认监管要求和银行的风险承担约束造成了套利限制。
30753.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, PE；JEL：F31, F32, F33, G11, G15, G21, G23, G40, G51, H55

30752.title: The 15-Minute City Quantified Using Mobility Data
30752.zh_title: 利用出行数据量化15分钟城市
30752.authors: Timur Abbiasov, Cate Heine, Edward L. Glaeser, Carlo Ratti, Sadegh Sabouri, Arianna Salazar Miranda, Paolo Santi
30752.abstract: Americans travel 7 to 9 miles on average for shopping and recreational activities, which is far longer than the 15-minute (walking) city advocated by ecologically-oriented urban planners. This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of local trip behavior in US cities using GPS data on individual trips from 40 million mobile devices. We define local usage as the share of trips made within 15-minutes walking distance from home, and find that the median US city resident makes only 12% of their daily trips within such a short distance. We find that differences in access to local services can explain eighty percent of the variation in 15-minute usage across metropolitan areas and 74 percent of the variation in usage within metropolitan areas. Differences in historic zoning permissiveness within New York suggest a causal link between access and usage, and that less restrictive zoning rules, such as permitting more mixed-use development, would lead to shorter travel times. Finally, we document a strong correlation between local usage and experienced segregation for poorer, but not richer, urbanites, which suggests that 15-minute cities may also exacerbate the social isolation of marginalized communities.
30752.zh_abstract: 美国人平均出行7到9英里进行购物和休闲活动，这远长于生态导向城市规划者倡导的15分钟（步行）城市。本文利用来自4000万移动设备的个人出行GPS数据，对美国城市的本地出行行为进行了全面分析。我们将本地使用定义为在家步行15分钟范围内出行的比例，发现美国城市居民中位数每天只有12%的出行是在如此短的距离内完成的。我们发现，本地服务可及性的差异可以解释大都市区之间15分钟使用率变化的80%，以及大都市区内使用率变化的74%。纽约市历史分区宽松程度的差异表明，可及性与使用之间存在因果关系，并且更宽松的分区规则（例如允许更多混合用途开发）将导致更短的出行时间。最后，我们记录了本地使用率与较贫困（而非较富裕）城市居民所经历隔离之间的强相关性，这表明15分钟城市也可能加剧边缘化社区的社会孤立。

30751.title: Monetary Policy When the Central Bank Shapes Financial-Market Sentiment
30751.zh_title: 央行塑造金融市场情绪时的货币政策
30751.authors: Anil K Kashyap, Jeremy C. Stein
30751.abstract: Recent research has found that monetary policy works in part by influencing the risk premiums on both traded financial-market securities and intermediated loans. Research has also shown that when risk premiums are compressed, there is an increased likelihood of a reversal that damages the credit-supply mechanism and the real economy. Together these effects create an intertemporal tradeoff for monetary policy, as stimulating the economy today can sow the seeds of a future downturn that might be difficult to offset. We introduce a simple model of this tradeoff and draw out its implications for the conduct of monetary policy.
30751.zh_abstract: 近期研究发现，货币政策在一定程度上通过影响交易性金融证券和中介贷款的 risk premiums 发挥作用。研究还表明，当 risk premiums 被压缩时，出现逆转的可能性增加，这会损害信贷供给机制和实体经济。这些效应共同为货币政策创造了一个跨期权衡，因为今天刺激经济可能播下未来经济低迷的种子，而这种低迷可能难以抵消。我们引入了一个关于这种权衡的简单模型，并阐述了其对货币政策实施的影响。

30750.title: Hispanic Americans in the Labor Market: Patterns Over Time and Across Generations
30750.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的西班牙裔美国人：跨时间和跨代的模式
30750.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Brian Duncan, Stephen J. Trejo
30750.abstract: This article reviews evidence on the labor market performance of Hispanics in the United States, with a particular focus on the US-born segment of this population. After discussing critical issues that arise in the US data sources commonly used to study Hispanics, we document how Hispanics currently compare with other Americans in terms of education, earnings, and labor supply, and then we discuss long-term trends in these outcomes. Relative to non-Hispanic Whites, US-born Hispanics from most national origin groups possess sizeable deficits in earnings, which in large part reflect corresponding educational deficits. Over time, rates of high school completion by US-born Hispanics have almost converged to those of non-Hispanic Whites, but the large Hispanic deficits in college completion have instead widened. Finally, from the perspective of immigrant generations, Hispanics experience substantial improvements in education and earnings between first-generation immigrants and the second-generation consisting of the US-born children of immigrants. Continued progress beyond the second generation is obscured by measurement issues arising from high rates of Hispanic intermarriage and the fact that later-generation descendants of Hispanic immigrants often do not self-identify as Hispanic when they come from families with mixed ethnic origins.
30750.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于美国西班牙裔劳动力市场表现的证据，特别关注这一群体中美国出生的部分。在讨论了常用于研究西班牙裔的美国数据源中出现的关键问题后，我们记录了西班牙裔目前在教育、收入和劳动力供给方面与其他美国人的比较情况，然后讨论了这些结果的长期趋势。与非西班牙裔白人相比，来自大多数原籍国的美国出生西班牙裔在收入方面存在显著差距，这在很大程度上反映了相应的教育差距。随着时间的推移，美国出生西班牙裔的高中毕业率几乎与非西班牙裔白人趋同，但西班牙裔在大学毕业率上的巨大差距反而扩大了。最后，从移民代际的角度来看，西班牙裔在第一代移民和第二代（即移民的美国出生子女）之间经历了教育和收入的显著改善。第二代之后的持续进步因西班牙裔高比例的通婚以及来自混合族裔背景的后期代际西班牙裔移民后代通常不自认为是西班牙裔这一事实所导致的测量问题而变得模糊不清。

30799.title: The Sweet Life: The Long-Term Effects of a Sugar-Rich Early Childhood
30799.zh_title: 甜蜜生活：含糖丰富的童年时期的长期影响
30799.abstract: We show that sugar-rich diet early in life has large adverse effects on the health and economic well-being of adults more than fifty years later. Excessive sugar intake early in life led to higher prevalence of chronic inflammation, diabetes, elevated cholesterol and arthritis. It also decreased post-secondary schooling, having a skilled occupation, and accumulating above median wealth. We identified elevated sugar consumption across lifespan as a likely pathway of impact. Exploiting the end of the post-WWII rationing of sugar and sweets in 1953 in the United Kingdom, we used a regression discontinuity design to identify these effects.
30799.zh_abstract: 我们表明，生命早期的高糖饮食对五十年后成年人的健康和经济福祉产生了巨大的不利影响。早期过量摄入糖分导致慢性炎症、糖尿病、胆固醇升高和关节炎的患病率更高。它还减少了中学后教育、从事技能型职业以及积累高于中位数的财富。我们确定整个生命周期的糖消费增加是一个可能的影响途径。利用1953年英国二战后糖和糖果配给制的结束，我们采用断点回归设计来识别这些影响。

30798.title: Making the (Letter) Grade: The Incentive Effects of Mandatory Pass/Fail Courses
30798.zh_title: 获得（字母）成绩：强制通过/不通过课程的激励效应
30798.authors: Kristin Butcher, Patrick McEwan, Akila Weerapana
30798.abstract: In Fall 2014, Wellesley College began mandating pass/fail grading for courses taken by first-year, first-semester students, although instructors continued to record letter grades. We identify the causal effect of the policy on course choice and performance, using a regression-discontinuity-in-time design. Students shifted to lower-grading STEM courses in the first semester, but did not increase their engagement with STEM in later semesters. Letter grades of first-semester students declined by 0.13 grade points, or 23% of a standard deviation. We evaluate causal channels of the grade effect—including sorting into lower-grading STEM courses and declining instructional quality—and conclude that the effect is consistent with declining student effort.
30798.zh_abstract: 2014年秋季，韦尔斯利学院开始对一年级第一学期学生所修课程强制实行通过/不通过评分制，尽管教师继续记录字母成绩。我们使用时间断点回归设计，识别该政策对课程选择和成绩的因果效应。学生在第一学期转向了评分更低的STEM课程，但在后续学期并未增加对STEM的参与。第一学期学生的字母成绩下降了0.13个绩点，即标准差的23%。我们评估了成绩效应的因果渠道——包括进入评分更低的STEM课程和教学质量下降——并得出结论，该效应与学生努力程度下降一致。

30797.title: The Contribution of High-Skilled Immigrants to Innovation in the United States
30797.zh_title: 高技能移民对美国创新的贡献
30797.authors: Shai Bernstein, Rebecca Diamond, Abhisit Jiranaphawiboon, Timothy McQuade, Beatriz Pousada
30797.abstract: We characterize the contribution of immigrants to US innovation. Leveraging new data, we use age of SSN assignment to identify immigrant status. Immigrants represent 16 percent of inventors, but authored 23 percent of patents. Immigrant inventors contribute to knowledge diffusion across borders. They disproportionately rely on foreign technologies and inventor collaborations. Using variation from premature inventor deaths, we find immigrant inventors create stronger innovation productivity spillovers on their collaborators, as compared to US-born inventors. A simple model implies immigrants are responsible for 32 percent of aggregate innovation, over half of which is due to human capital externalities on US-born collaborators.
30797.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了移民对美国创新的贡献。利用新数据，我们使用社会安全号码分配的年龄来识别移民身份。移民占发明家的16%，但撰写了23%的专利。移民发明家促进了知识跨境扩散。他们不成比例地依赖外国技术和发明家合作。利用发明家过早死亡的变化，我们发现与美国本土出生的发明家相比，移民发明家对其合作者产生了更强的创新生产力溢出效应。一个简单模型表明，移民负责32%的总创新，其中超过一半是由于对美国本土出生合作者的人力资本外部性。

30796.title: Leverage and Stablecoin Pegs
30796.authors: Gary B. Gorton, Elizabeth C. Klee, Chase P. Ross, Sharon Y. Ross, Alexandros P. Vardoulakis
30796.abstract: Money is debt that circulates with no questions asked. Stablecoins are a new form of private money that circulate with many questions asked. We show how stablecoins can maintain a constant price even though they face run risk and pay no interest. Stablecoin holders are indirectly compensated for stablecoin run risk because they can lend the coins to levered traders. Levered traders are willing to pay a premium to borrow stablecoins when speculative demand is strong. Therefore, the stablecoin can support a $\$1$ peg even with higher levels of run risk.
30796.zh_abstract: 货币是一种无需质疑即可流通的债务。稳定币是一种新型的私人货币，其流通伴随着许多质疑。我们展示了稳定币如何能够维持恒定价格，尽管它们面临挤兑风险且不支付利息。稳定币持有者间接获得了稳定币挤兑风险的补偿，因为他们可以将这些币借给杠杆交易者。当投机需求强劲时，杠杆交易者愿意支付溢价来借入稳定币。因此，即使挤兑风险水平较高，稳定币也能维持1美元的挂钩。

30795.title: In-Person Schooling and Youth Suicide: Evidence from School Calendars and Pandemic School Closures
30795.zh_title: 线下教学与青少年自杀：来自校历和疫情学校关闭的证据
30795.authors: Benjamin Hansen, Joseph J. Sabia, Jessamyn Schaller
30795.abstract: This study explores the effect of in-person schooling on youth suicide. We document three key findings. First, using data from the National Vital Statistics System from 1990-2019, we document the historical association between teen suicides and the school calendar. We show that suicides among 12-to-18-year-olds are highest during months of the school year and lowest during summer months (June through August) and also establish that areas with schools starting in early August experience increases in teen suicides in August, while areas with schools starting in September don’t see youth suicides rise until September. Second, we show that this seasonal pattern dramatically changed in 2020. Teen suicides plummeted in March 2020, when the COVID-19 pandemic began in the U.S. and remained low throughout the summer before rising in Fall 2020 when many K-12 schools returned to in-person instruction. Third, using county-level variation in school reopenings in Fall 2020 and Spring 2021—proxied by anonymized SafeGraph smartphone data on elementary and secondary school foot traffic—we find that returning from online to in-person schooling was associated with a 12-to-18 percent increase teen suicides. This result is robust to controls for seasonal effects and general lockdown effects (proxied by restaurant and bar foot traffic), and survives falsification tests using suicides among young adults ages 19-to-25. Auxiliary analyses using Google Trends queries and the Youth Risk Behavior Survey suggests that bullying victimization may be an important mechanism.
30795.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了线下教学对青少年自杀的影响。我们记录了三个关键发现。首先，利用1990-2019年国家生命统计系统的数据，我们记录了青少年自杀与校历之间的历史关联。我们发现，12至18岁青少年的自杀率在学年月份最高，在夏季月份（6月至8月）最低，并且还证实，在8月初开学的地区，青少年自杀率在8月上升，而在9月开学的地区，青少年自杀率直到9月才上升。其次，我们表明这种季节性模式在2020年发生了巨大变化。2020年3月，当新冠疫情在美国开始时，青少年自杀率急剧下降，并在整个夏季保持低位，直到2020年秋季许多K-12学校恢复线下教学时才上升。第三，利用2020年秋季和2021年春季县级学校复课的变化（以SafeGraph匿名化的小学和中学人流智能手机数据作为代理），我们发现从线上教学回归线下教学与青少年自杀率增加12%至18%相关。这一结果在对季节性效应和一般封锁效应（以餐厅和酒吧人流作为代理）进行控制后依然稳健，并且在使用19至25岁年轻人自杀率进行的证伪检验中幸存。利用谷歌趋势查询和青少年风险行为调查进行的辅助分析表明，欺凌受害可能是一个重要机制。
30795.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I1, I18, I19, I2

30794.title: Liquid Democracy. Two Experiments on Delegation in Voting
30794.zh_title: 流动民主：关于投票中委托的两项实验
30794.authors: Joseph Campbell, Alessandra Casella, Lucas de Lara, Victoria R. Mooers, Dilip Ravindran
30794.abstract: Under Liquid Democracy (LD), decisions are taken by referendum, but voters are allowed to delegate their votes to other voters. Theory shows that in common interest problems where experts are correctly identified, the outcome can be superior to simple majority voting. However, even when experts are correctly identified, delegation must be used sparely because it reduces the variety of independent information sources. We report the results of two experiments, each studying two treatments: in one treatment, participants have the option of delegating to better informed individuals; in the second, participants can choose to abstain. The first experiment follows a tightly controlled design planned for the lab; the second is a perceptual task run online where information about signals’ precision is ambiguous. The two designs are very different, but the experiments reach the same result: in both, delegation rates are unexpectedly high and higher than abstention rates, and LD underperforms relative to both universal voting and abstention.
30794.zh_abstract: 在流动民主制度下，决策通过全民公决做出，但允许选民将投票权委托给其他选民。理论表明，在专家被正确识别的共同利益问题中，其结果可能优于简单多数投票。然而，即使专家被正确识别，也必须谨慎使用委托，因为它减少了独立信息来源的多样性。我们报告了两项实验的结果，每项实验研究两种处理方式：一种处理中，参与者可以选择委托给信息更充分的个人；另一种处理中，参与者可以选择弃权。第一项实验遵循为实验室设计的严格控制方案；第二项是一项在线进行的感知任务，其中关于信号精度的信息是模糊的。这两种设计截然不同，但实验得出了相同的结果：在这两种设计中，委托率都出乎意料地高，且高于弃权率，并且流动民主的表现既不如普遍投票，也不如弃权。

30793.title: Risk Management and the Autonomy of Labor
30793.zh_title: 风险管理与劳动者自主权
30793.authors: Andreas J. Dambaur, Keith Marzilli Ericson, Johannes G. Jaspersen, Sandra Zoller
30793.abstract: Foresightful workers can take actions to reduce their exposure to risk in labor markets, but existing evidence on narrow bracketing suggests that individuals might not optimally integrate risk reduction decisions with subsequent labor decisions. In an online labor market, we vary the level of worker autonomy when transcribing a set of documents and measure the willingness to do preventative tasks to reduce the expected total task length. If workers integrate their risk management decisions with subsequent labor effort, the high-autonomy group should be more likely to engage in prevention, since they can adjust their work to accommodate the preventative effort. In contrast, if workers narrowly bracket the decision, it should not be affected by autonomy. We find that workers in the high autonomy condition are more likely to undertake prevention, consistent with an integrated view of risk management and later labor decisions. Our results have implications for designing effective incentive systems, particularly in times of the gig-economy and rising popularity of working from home.
30793.zh_abstract: 有远见的劳动者可以采取行动减少其在劳动力市场中的风险暴露，但现有关于狭隘框架的证据表明，个人可能无法将风险降低决策与后续劳动决策进行最优整合。在一个在线劳动力市场中，我们在转录一组文档时改变劳动者的自主权水平，并衡量其进行预防性任务以减少预期总任务长度的意愿。如果劳动者将风险管理决策与后续劳动努力整合起来，那么高自主权群体应该更有可能参与预防，因为他们可以调整工作以适应预防性努力。相反，如果劳动者狭隘地框定决策，则不应受到自主权的影响。我们发现，高自主权条件下的劳动者更有可能进行预防，这与风险管理与后续劳动决策整合的观点一致。我们的结果对设计有效的激励系统具有启示意义，尤其是在零工经济和居家办公日益流行的时代。

30792.title: Domestic Violence and the Mental Health and Well-being of Victims and Their Children
30792.zh_title: 家庭暴力对受害者及其子女心理健康与福祉的影响
30792.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Gordon B. Dahl, Katrine V. Løken, Magne Mogstad
30792.abstract: Almost one third of women worldwide report some form of physical or sexual violence by a partner in their lifetime, yet little is known about the mental health and well-being effects for either victims or their children. We study the costs associated with domestic violence (DV) in the context of Norway, where we can link offenders to victims and their children over time. Our difference-in-differences framework uses those who will be victimized in the future as controls. We find that a DV report involving the police is associated with large changes in the home environment, including marital dissolution and a corresponding decline in financial resources. A DV report increases mental health visits by 35% for victims and by 19% for their children in the year of the event, effects which taper off over time for the victim, but not for children. Victims also experience more doctor visits, lower employment, reduced earnings and a higher use of disability insurance while their children are more likely to receive child protective services and commit a crime. Using a complementary RD design, we find that a DV report results in declines both in children’s test scores and completion of the first year of high school.
30792.zh_abstract: 全球近三分之一的女性报告在一生中曾遭受伴侣某种形式的身体或性暴力，然而，关于受害者或其子女的心理健康和福祉影响却知之甚少。我们在挪威的背景下研究了与家庭暴力相关的成本，在那里我们可以将犯罪者与受害者及其子女随时间联系起来。我们的双重差分框架使用未来将成为受害者的人作为对照组。我们发现，涉及警方的家庭暴力报告与家庭环境的巨大变化相关，包括婚姻解体以及相应的财务资源减少。家庭暴力报告使受害者在事件发生当年的心理健康就诊次数增加35%，其子女增加19%，这些影响对受害者随时间逐渐减弱，但对子女则不然。受害者还经历了更多的医生就诊、更低的就业率、减少的收入以及更高的残疾保险使用率，而其子女更有可能接受儿童保护服务并犯罪。利用互补的断点回归设计，我们发现家庭暴力报告导致儿童考试成绩和高中第一年完成率下降。

30791.title: The Impact of Direct-to-Consumer Advertising on Outpatient Care Utilization
30791.zh_title: 直接面向消费者的广告对门诊护理利用的影响
30791.authors: Matthew D. Eisenberg, Brendan Rabideau, Abby E. Alpert, Rosemary J. Avery, Jeff Niederdeppe, Neeraj Sood
30791.abstract: There is much debate about the effects of pharmaceutical direct to consumer advertising (DTCA) on health care use. In this paper, we inform this debate by examining the effects of DTCA on office visits, as well as treatment courses resulting from those visits, for five common chronic conditions (hypertension, hyperlipidemia, diabetes, depression, and osteoporosis). In particular, we examine whether office visits result in use of drug therapy and/or continued office visits over time. We test these questions by combining data on pharmaceutical advertising from Nielsen with claims data from 40 large national employers, covering 18 million person-years. We analyze a non-elderly population by exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in advertising exposure across areas due to the implementation of Medicare prescription drug coverage which led to larger increases in advertising in areas with high elderly share of population compared to low elderly share areas. We find that advertising increases the number of office visits for the non-elderly for the advertised condition. We also find substantial spillovers -- a large share of the increased office visits from advertising are associated with use of non-advertised generic drugs or do not result in use of any drugs. Finally, we find that the increase in office visits due to DTCA is associated with continued engagement with a physician through multiple consecutive follow up visits over time.
30791.zh_abstract: 关于药品直接面向消费者广告（DTCA）对医疗保健使用的影响存在诸多争论。本文通过研究DTCA对五种常见慢性病（高血压、高脂血症、糖尿病、抑郁症和骨质疏松症）的门诊就诊次数以及由此产生的治疗过程的影响，为这一争论提供信息。具体而言，我们考察门诊就诊是否会导致药物治疗的使用和/或随时间推移的持续门诊就诊。我们通过将尼尔森公司的药品广告数据与覆盖1800万人年、来自40家大型全国性雇主的索赔数据相结合来检验这些问题。我们分析了一个非老年人群，利用因实施医疗保险处方药覆盖计划而导致的各地区广告暴露的外生性变化，该计划导致老年人口比例高的地区广告增长幅度大于老年人口比例低的地区。我们发现，广告增加了非老年人群针对广告所宣传疾病的门诊就诊次数。我们还发现了显著的溢出效应——因广告而增加的门诊就诊中，有很大一部分与使用非广告宣传的仿制药有关，或者并未导致任何药物的使用。最后，我们发现，由DTCA导致的门诊就诊增加，与患者通过随时间推移多次连续的后续随访与医生保持持续联系有关。

30790.title: The Insurance Implications of Government Student Loan Repayment Schemes
30790.zh_title: 政府学生贷款还款计划的保险含义
30790.authors: Martin Gervais, Qian Liu, Lance Lochner
30790.abstract: We use new administrative data that links detailed information on Canadian student loan recipients with their repayment and income histories from the Canada Student Loans Program (CSLP), income tax filings, and post-secondary schooling records to measure the extent to which student borrowers adjust loan repayments to insure against income variation. Several mechanisms are available for students to adjust loan repayments in response to income fluctuations: formal, like CSLP's Repayment Assistance Plan; and informal, such as delinquency or default. Borrowers can also make larger payments than required should they experience unexpectedly high income. Indeed, loan payments are shown to increase in income, more so in early years and for individuals with higher initial debt. More formally, we estimate that on average, an unexpected $\$1,000$ change in year-over-year income is associated with a $\$30$ change in loan payment: from a $\$50$ change the year after graduation, declining to a $\$20$ change 5 years after graduation. Loan repayments are also used to absorb income variation that is more permanent in nature: for borrowers whose income is consistently below or above expected income at graduation, the magnitude of average repayment adjustment is similar to the average yearly response.
30790.zh_abstract: 我们利用新的行政数据，这些数据将加拿大学生贷款接收者的详细信息与来自加拿大学生贷款计划（CSLP）的还款和收入历史、所得税申报表以及高等教育记录相关联，来衡量学生借款人调整贷款还款以抵御收入波动的程度。学生可以通过多种机制根据收入波动调整贷款还款：正式机制，如CSLP的还款援助计划；以及非正式机制，如逾期或违约。如果借款人意外获得高收入，他们也可以支付比要求更多的款项。事实上，贷款还款额随收入增加而增加，在毕业后的最初几年以及初始债务较高的个人中更为明显。更正式地说，我们估计，平均而言，年收入每意外变化1000美元，贷款还款额就会变化30美元：从毕业后第一年的50美元变化，下降到毕业后5年的20美元变化。贷款还款也被用于吸收更具持久性的收入波动：对于收入持续低于或高于毕业时预期收入的借款人，平均还款调整幅度与平均年度响应幅度相似。
30790.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：E21, G51, H52, I22

30789.title: Women's Empowerment and the Intrinsic Demand for Agency: Experimental Evidence from Nigeria
30789.zh_title: 女性赋权与对自主权的内在需求：来自尼日利亚的实验证据
30789.authors: M. Mehrab Bakhtiar, Marcel Fafchamps, Markus Goldstein, Kenneth L. Leonard, Sreelakshmi Papineni
30789.abstract: Most studies of intrahousehold resource allocation examine outcomes and do not consider the decision-making process by which those outcomes are achieved. We conduct an original lab-in-the-field experiment on the decision-making process of married couples over the allocation of rival and non-rival household goods. The experiment measures individual preferences over allocations and traces the process of consultation, communication, deferral, and accommodation by which couples implement these preferences. We find few differences in individual preferences over allocations of goods. However, wives and husbands have strong preferences over process: women prefer to defer budget allocation decisions to their husband even when deferral is costly and is not observed by the husband; the reverse is true for men. Our study follows a randomized controlled trial that ended a year earlier and gave large cash transfers over fifteen months to half of the women in the study. We estimate the effect of treatment on the demand for agency among women and find that the receipt of cash transfers does not change women's bargaining process except in a secret condition when the decision to defer is shrouded from her husband: only in that case does the cash transfer increase women's expressed demand for agency.
30789.zh_abstract: 大多数关于家庭内部资源分配的研究关注的是结果，而不考虑实现这些结果的决策过程。我们进行了一项原创的实地实验室实验，研究已婚夫妇在竞争性和非竞争性家庭商品分配上的决策过程。该实验衡量了个人对分配的偏好，并追溯了夫妻实现这些偏好的协商、沟通、延迟和迁就过程。我们发现个人对商品分配的偏好差异很小。然而，妻子和丈夫对过程有强烈的偏好：女性倾向于将预算分配决策推迟给丈夫，即使延迟是有成本的且不被丈夫观察到；男性则相反。我们的研究遵循了一项一年前结束的随机对照试验，该试验在十五个月内向研究中一半的女性提供了大额现金转移。我们估计了干预措施对女性自主权需求的影响，发现接受现金转移并不会改变女性的讨价还价过程，除非在一种秘密条件下，即延迟决定对丈夫保密：只有在这种情况下，现金转移才会增加女性所表达的自主权需求。

30788.title: Economies of Density and Congestion in Equipment Rental Markets
30788.zh_title: 设备租赁市场中的密度经济与拥堵效应
30788.authors: Julieta Caunedo, Namrata Kala, Haimeng Zhang
30788.abstract: Rental markets are expanding access to mechanization for small-holder farmers in developing countries. However, gains from adoption depend on market structure and the spatial concentration of demand, which implies that understanding how mechanization is allocated during peak demand is key to understanding the returns to policies expanding access. We develop a model of equipment rental markets where demand varies by farm size and location, and supply varies by dispatch rule (first-come-first-served vs. profit-maximizing). An efficient allocation prioritizes large-scale demand, because the cost of moving equipment in space dilutes with scale; as well as small-scale demand in dense locations, because it maximizes machine-capacity utilization. Using novel transaction-level data and a new census of farmers from Karnataka, India, we calibrate the model and evaluate policy-relevant counterfactuals to expand access. Deregulating first-come-first-served rules to allow profit maximization raises aggregate surplus by 10% and reduces output costs from delays by 31% (about 2.8 p.p. in units of average productivity). All farmers experience gains, with large-holders benefiting relatively more. These effects are comparable in magnitude to a 20% increase in equipment supply, but save the cost of that increased capacity.
30788.zh_abstract: 租赁市场正在扩大发展中国家小农户获得机械化的机会。然而，采用机械化带来的收益取决于市场结构和需求的空间集中度，这意味着理解机械化在需求高峰期如何分配是理解扩大准入政策回报的关键。我们构建了一个设备租赁市场模型，其中需求因农场规模和地点而异，供给因调度规则（先到先得与利润最大化）而异。有效的分配会优先考虑大规模需求，因为设备在空间上的移动成本会随规模扩大而稀释；同时也会优先考虑密集地区的小规模需求，因为这能最大化机器产能利用率。利用来自印度卡纳塔克邦的新型交易层面数据和一项新的农民普查，我们校准了模型并评估了扩大准入的政策相关反事实。放松先到先得规则以允许利润最大化，使总剩余提高了10%，并将延误造成的产出成本降低了31%（约为平均生产率单位的2.8个百分点）。所有农民都获得了收益，其中大规模持有者受益相对更多。这些影响在规模上与设备供应增加20%相当，但节省了增加该产能的成本。

30787.title: Central Banks as Dollar Lenders of Last Resort: Implications for Regulation and Reserve Holdings
30787.zh_title: 作为美元最后贷款人的中央银行：对监管和储备持有的影响
30787.authors: Mitali Das, Gita Gopinath, Taehoon Kim, Jeremy C. Stein
30787.abstract: This paper explores how non-U.S. central banks behave when firms in their economies engage in currency mismatch, borrowing more heavily in dollars than justified by their operating exposures. We begin by documenting that, in a panel of 53 countries, central bank holdings of dollar reserves are significantly correlated with the dollar-denominated bank borrowing of their non-financial corporate sectors, controlling for a number of known covariates of reserve accumulation. We then build a model in which the central bank can deal with private-sector mismatch, and the associated risk of a domestic financial crisis, in two ways: (i) by imposing ex ante financial regulations such as bank capital requirements; or (ii) by building a stockpile of dollar reserves that allow it to serve as an ex post dollar lender of last resort. The model highlights a novel externality: individual central banks may tend to over-accumulate dollar reserves, relative to what a global planner would choose. This is because individual central banks do not internalize that their hoarding of reserves exacerbates a global scarcity of dollar-denominated safe assets, which lowers dollar interest rates and encourages firms to increase the currency mismatch of their liabilities. Relative to the decentralized outcome, a global planner may prefer stricter financial regulation (e.g., higher bank capital requirements) and reduced holdings of dollar reserves.
30787.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了当经济体中的企业存在货币错配，即美元借款超过其经营敞口所合理对应的水平时，非美国中央银行的行为。我们首先记录到，在53个国家的面板数据中，控制了一系列已知的储备积累协变量后，中央银行的美元储备持有量与其非金融企业部门的美元计价银行借款显著相关。然后，我们构建了一个模型，在该模型中，中央银行可以通过两种方式处理私营部门的货币错配及其相关的国内金融危机风险：(i) 实施事前金融监管，例如银行资本要求；或 (ii) 建立美元储备库存，使其能够充当事后美元最后贷款人。该模型突出了一个新颖的外部性：相对于全球规划者会选择的结果，单个中央银行可能倾向于过度积累美元储备。这是因为单个中央银行没有内化其储备囤积会加剧全球美元计价安全资产的稀缺性，从而降低美元利率并鼓励企业增加其负债的货币错配。相对于分散决策的结果，全球规划者可能更偏好更严格的金融监管（例如，更高的银行资本要求）和减少的美元储备持有量。

30786.title: Nothing Propinks Like Propinquity: Using Machine Learning to Estimate the Effects of Spatial Proximity in the Major League Baseball Draft
30786.zh_title: 亲近滋生亲近：使用机器学习估计美国职业棒球大联盟选秀中空间邻近性的影响
30786.authors: Majid Ahmadi, Nathan Durst, Jeff Lachman, John A. List, Mason List, Noah List, Atom T. Vayalinkal
30786.abstract: Recent models and empirical work on network formation emphasize the importance of propinquity in producing strong interpersonal connections. Yet, one might wonder how deep such insights run, as thus far empirical results rely on survey and lab-based evidence. In this study, we examine propinquity in a high-stakes setting of talent allocation: the Major League Baseball (MLB) Draft from 2000-2019 (30,000 players were drafted from a player pool of more than a million potential draftees). Our findings can be summarized in four parts. First, propinquity is alive and well in our setting, and spans even the latter years of our sample, when higher-level statistical exercises have become the norm rather than the exception. Second, the measured effect size is consequential, as MLB clubs pay a significant opportunity cost in terms of inferior talent acquired due to propinquity bias: for example, their draft picks are 38% less likely to ever play a MLB game relative to players drafted without propinquity bias. Third, those players who benefit from propinquity bias fare better both in terms of the timing of their draft picks and their initial financial contract, conditional on draft order. Finally, the effect is found to be the most pronounced in later rounds of the draft, where the Scouting Director has the greatest latitude.
30786.zh_abstract: 最近关于网络形成的模型和实证工作强调了亲近性在产生强大人际联系中的重要性。然而，人们可能想知道这种见解的深度如何，因为迄今为止的实证结果依赖于调查和实验室证据。在本研究中，我们在人才分配的高风险环境中考察了亲近性：2000年至2019年的美国职业棒球大联盟（MLB）选秀（从超过100万潜在选秀球员中选出了30,000名球员）。我们的发现可以概括为四个部分。首先，在我们的环境中，亲近性依然存在且活跃，甚至延伸到我们样本的后期年份，那时更高级别的统计分析已成为常态而非例外。其次，测量的效应量是显著的，因为MLB俱乐部因亲近性偏见而获得了劣质人才，从而付出了巨大的机会成本：例如，与没有亲近性偏见选中的球员相比，他们的选秀球员最终参加MLB比赛的可能性要低38%。第三，那些受益于亲近性偏见的球员，在选秀顺位的时间以及初始财务合同方面（在控制选秀顺序后）都表现更好。最后，发现这种效应在选秀的后几轮最为显著，因为此时球探总监拥有最大的自由裁量权。

30785.title: Common Ownership, Competition, and Top Management Incentives
30785.zh_title: 共同所有权、竞争与高管激励
30785.authors: Miguel Anton, Florian Ederer, Mireia Gine, Martin C. Schmalz
30785.abstract: We present a mechanism based on managerial incentives through which common ownership affects product market outcomes. Firm-level variation in common ownership causes variation in managerial incentives and productivity across firms, which leads to intra-industry and intra-firm cross-market variation in prices, output, markups, and market shares that is consistent with empirical evidence. The organizational structure of multiproduct firms and the passivity of common owners determine whether higher prices under common ownership result from higher costs or from higher markups. Using panel regressions and a difference-in-differences design we document that managerial incentives are less performance-sensitive in firms with more common ownership.
30785.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于管理层激励的机制，通过该机制，共同所有权影响产品市场结果。共同所有权在企业层面的差异导致管理层激励和生产率在企业间的差异，进而导致行业内和企业内跨市场的价格、产出、加成率和市场份额的差异，这与实证证据一致。多产品企业的组织结构和共同所有者的被动性决定了共同所有权下的更高价格是由更高成本还是更高加成率导致的。利用面板回归和双重差分设计，我们记录到，在共同所有权程度更高的企业中，管理层激励对业绩的敏感性较低。
30785.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE；JEL：D21, G32, J33, L13, L21, M12

30784.title: Theory for Extending Single-Product Production Function Estimation to Multi-Product Settings
30784.zh_title: 将单一产品生产函数估计扩展到多产品环境的理论
30784.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Amil Petrin, Valerie Smeets, Frederic Warzynski
30784.abstract: We introduce a new methodology for estimating multi-product production functions. It embeds the seminal contributions of Diewert (1973) and Lau (1976) in our extended version of the semi-parametric econometric framework of Olley and Pakes (1996), where we address the simultaneity of inputs and outputs by allowing for the possibility of a possible vector of unobserved ”productivities,” all of which may be freely correlated with inputs and outputs. We show how to use the multi-product production function to recover estimates of firm-product marginal costs using the input and output elasticities by extending Hall’s (1988) single-product result to our multi-product setting using McFadden (1978). We focus on six 6-digit Belgian ”industries” that produce two products, finding all but five of the forty-eight input coefficients are positive and thirty eight are strongly significant. We find outputs are substitutes as the coefficients on ”other good output” is always negative and highly significant. 100% of marginal cost estimates are positive and close to 80% of markups are estimated to be greater than 1. We find very similar results when we move to 4-digit industries, when we use similar multi-product data from France, and when we use the trans-log approximation.
30784.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种估计多产品生产函数的新方法。它将Diewert（1973）和Lau（1976）的开创性贡献嵌入到我们扩展版的Olley和Pakes（1996）半参数计量经济学框架中，在该框架中，我们通过允许存在一个可能的未观测“生产率”向量（所有这些生产率都可能与投入和产出自由相关）来解决投入和产出的同时性问题。我们展示了如何使用多产品生产函数，通过将Hall（1988）的单一产品结果扩展到我们的多产品环境（使用McFadden（1978）），利用投入和产出弹性来恢复企业-产品边际成本的估计值。我们聚焦于生产两种产品的六个比利时6位数“行业”，发现48个投入系数中除五个外均为正，且38个高度显著。我们发现产出是替代品，因为“其他产品产出”的系数始终为负且高度显著。100%的边际成本估计值为正，近80%的加成率估计值大于1。当我们转向4位数行业、使用来自法国的类似多产品数据以及使用超越对数近似时，我们发现了非常相似的结果。

30783.title: Crypto Wash Trading
30783.authors: Lin William Cong, Xi Li, Ke Tang, Yang Yang
30783.abstract: We introduce systematic tests exploiting robust statistical and behavioral patterns in trading to detect fake transactions on 29 cryptocurrency exchanges. Regulated exchanges feature patterns consistently observed in financial markets and nature; abnormal first-significant-digit distributions, size rounding, and transaction tail distributions on unregulated exchanges reveal rampant manipulations unlikely driven by strategy or exchange heterogeneity. We quantify the wash trading on each unregulated exchange, which averaged over 70% of the reported volume. We further document how these fabricated volumes (trillions of dollars annually) improve exchange ranking, temporarily distort prices, and relate to exchange characteristics (e.g., age and userbase), market conditions, and regulation.
30783.zh_abstract: 我们引入了系统性测试，利用交易中稳健的统计和行为模式，检测29个加密货币交易所上的虚假交易。受监管的交易所呈现出金融市场和自然界中一致观察到的模式；而未受监管交易所上异常的首位数字分布、规模舍入和交易尾部分布，揭示了不太可能由策略或交易所异质性驱动的猖獗操纵行为。我们量化了每个未受监管交易所的洗售交易量，其平均占报告交易量的70%以上。我们进一步记录了这些虚构交易量（每年数万亿美元）如何提升交易所排名、暂时扭曲价格，并与交易所特征（如年龄和用户基础）、市场状况及监管相关联。
